signals.npcLine: Crypto tides turn sour; shadows thick with dread.
signals.questPulse: Fear spreads through neon alleys; markets recoil.
signals.worldFeed: Global crypto dims; value slips beneath the neon haze.
signals.clueEvent: Unseen cracks surface in digital finance networks.

signals.npcLine: RAVE pulses upwards, a fleeting spark in dark streets.
signals.questPulse: Minor digital traction on fringe tokens; watch for shifts.
signals.worldFeed: Low-profile coins flicker with strange, unnoticed energy.
signals.clueEvent: Silent surge detected around RAVE micro-exchanges.

signals.npcLine: PENGU whispers through underground channels—signals glitchy, but alive.
signals.questPulse: Unknown assets stir beneath neon glows; cryptic hints abound.
signals.worldFeed: Trader chatter hints at hidden value shifts in cold chains.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted chatter spikes concerning PENGU cold vaults.

signals.npcLine: CHIP clatters on dim market boards; alert for sharp moves.
signals.questPulse: Circuit buzz intensifies around CHIP’s flickering nodes.
signals.worldFeed: Chip tokens catch brief neon fire before fading fast.
signals.clueEvent: Rapid micro trades detected on CHIP subnets.

signals.npcLine: OPG fades quietly into market shadows; ghosts in the machine.
signals.questPulse: Low impact ripple, barely felt but persistent in code streams.
signals.worldFeed: OPG’s digital footprint evaporates into cyber voids.
signals.clueEvent: Stealth exits logged on OPG ledger segments.
